---
title: "Take-home Exercise 2"
subtitle: "Prototyping Module for Visual Analytics Shiny Application"
author: "Group Project Starter"
date: "2026-03-12"
---

## shiny

```{r}
shiny::runApp("C:/Users/12697/Documents/Playground/smu-tourism-recovery-va-group-project/team/jin-qinhao/Take-Home-Exercise2/shiny")
```
